calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jan-13-2004 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Sara Lerschen
Petitioner Shannon Minter present in pro per, was sworn and examined.
The Court grants the petition for change of name to : Shannon Price Minter.
The Court further orders the GENDER of Shannon Price Miner is changed from FEMALE to MALE.
Decree signed in open court.
